docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $50.00 FILED BY TO, CHERRY AS TO DEFENDANT LI, JUEI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-10-2024 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-10-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-10-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF CHERRY TO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JUEI LI IS PRESENT. BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT WERE ASSISTED BY MANDARIN INTERPRETER AIDONG NI. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TO, CHERRY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LI, JUEI STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00) SERVED FEB-15-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LI, JUEI
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY TO, CHERRY LI, JUEI
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-10-2024 - JUDGMENT.
